summary: Webiny exposes GraphQL developer surfaces (Headless CMS plus the main Webiny GraphQL API) and a Webiny CLI; the documented Headless CMS GraphQL API uses an API key, while the other surfaces’ auth mechanics are not fully pinned down from the docs read.

surfaces.name: Webiny Headless CMS GraphQL API
surfaces.url: GraphQL API URL varies by API type (manage, preview, read) and locale; retrieve it from the API Playground or `yarn webiny info --env dev`.

surfaces.name: Webiny Main GraphQL API
surfaces.url: Main GraphQL API URL is available in the API Playground; the docs describe it as the API used by Page Builder, Headless CMS, File Manager, and other default Webiny applications.
